creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Yuri,

Have you had time to take a look at that request ?

misc/usd (PR 282627) and science/madness (PR 252694) are the only remaining consumers of devel/tbb. 

Updating those 2 ports would allow closing PR 252648 and remove old devel/tbb from the tree.

Thanks in advance,

Ganael.
